introduction: Minhee: Her husband, Young Jun, is breaking down because of her relationship with Miss Choi. Minhei went to the villa of the president of the Kang, and was raped by Yangyil, the bodyguard of the husband and wife, by witnessing the portrait of the young man named Yunyah and Yunha. In the end, the divorced Min-hee comes back to Jeju Island, where she is acquainted with the acquisition of a Korean-American friend, One day, Minhei goes to a bar to soothe her bitterness and loneliness, and then meets Jae Ho who goes there. Jeho lived with a young child in a widower. Minhee becomes a wife of Jaejoong because of the jaehyeon that the child is pitiful and loves. Rejohn, who was a good man for a while, runs away with all his possessions and goes to kindergarten to meet his son, Wooki, in a sluggish state. When he finds a house that is going home in the rain, he rushes and draws the house. Minhee feels the hot gaze of her husband holding the umbrella behind her.
